body.activation: only runs when manifest.sibling_artifacts.workflow_evidence is an object
body.file_name_default: workflow_evidence.json unless descriptor.file_name is a string
path_resolution_order: manifest_path.parent / sibling.bundle_dir / file_name when bundle_dir is relative
manifest_path.parent / manifest.export_id / file_name when export_id is nonblank string
export_path.parent / manifest.export_id / file_name when export_id is nonblank string
body.path_deduplication: expanduser path; skip candidates already tried; choose first existing path

content_hash.algorithm: sha256 over exact workflow evidence file bytes

signature.signed_message: actual content_hash string encoded as UTF-8

priority: key_manifest or key_manifest_url argument resolved by key_id/purpose/signing_time
cached ~/.keel-verifier/trust-root.json when no explicit trust override and not self_attested
bundled keel_verifier/data/trust_root.json when no cached manifest
key_resolution.manifest_key_id_rule: if artifact key_id is present, select the first manifest key with matching purpose and key_id
key_resolution.legacy_no_key_id_rule: if no key_id and signing time is parseable, require exactly one purpose-matching manifest entry active at signing time; if signing time is absent/unparseable, require exactly one purpose-matching entry total
key_resolution.active_window_rule: An absent or null valid_from/valid_to is open-ended; a present non-null value that does not parse to a valid timestamp makes the manifest entry malformed and excludes it from matching any signing_time (fail-closed).

verification.public_key_decode: remove optional ed25519: prefix, base64-decode remaining text, Ed25519PublicKey.from_public_bytes
verification.signature_decode: remove optional ed25519: prefix, base64-decode remaining text

body.document_parse: workflow evidence file bytes must decode as UTF-8 JSON object
body.document_semantics: after sibling hash/signature succeeds, verify workflow evidence document using keel.workflow.canonicalization.v1 workflow_evidence_document and workflow record rules with declaration effective hash required
